content: MEI Fácil (by Neon bank) integrates DAS management, annual DASN declarations, digital PJ account, PIX and transfers, invoice generation, and card machine access in a single banking app. Official government App MEI (Receita Federal) handles DAS issuance/payment, DASN-SIMEI filing, SIMEI debt consultation, refund requests, and CNPJ consultation. MaisMei is the top-rated MEI app (4.8/5 App Store, 4.7 Google Play, 34k+ reviews, 4M+ users) offering: free DAS guides, NFS-e emission (major cities), CNPJ card/certificate, INSS benefit status, payment reminders; paid: CNPJ opening, annual declaration filing, alterations, digital certificates.
